title: rhynchosinapis cheiranthos subsp. setigera
intro: Rhynchosinapis cheiranthos subsp. setigera, also known as a sub-species of the greater cress, is a plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The medicinal properties of Rhynchosinapis cheiranthos subsp. setigera include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions or decoctions, and its seeds are also used as a spice in some culinary traditions.
